sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82918" key="*phlago/nes" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Πηλᾰγόνες</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">οἱ</gen>, <sense id="n82918.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πηλόγονος</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πῆλαι</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πάλλω</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
